## 📋 Today's Overview
*July 01, 2026*

### Superconductivity (13 new today)

1. **The study focuses on** the layered van der Waals superconductor 4Hb-TaS₂, **employing** low-temperature ultrasound measurements, specific heat, and ac magnetic susceptibility **to address/solve** the detection of an additional anomaly deep inside the superconducting state near T* ≈ 1 K.
2. **The study focuses on** two-dimensional (2D) many-body systems, **employing** the scaling of the condensate fraction **to address/solve** the accurate determination of the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transition temperature.
3. **The study focuses on** on-chip bandpass filters for millimeter-wave multichroic imaging, **employing** a design based on superconducting coplanar waveguide geometry **to address/solve** the integration of band-defining filters into large-format multi-band detector arrays.
4. **The study focuses on** the chiral topological semimetal Ag₂Pd₃S, **employing** experimental and theoretical characterization **to address/solve** the investigation of unconventional superconductivity in an intrinsically chiral material.
5. **The study focuses on** neuromorphic computing hardware, **employing** a resistively shunted superconducting wirelet as a minimal artificial neuron **to address/solve** the implementation of temporal neuromorphic computation with pattern recognition capabilities.
6. **The study focuses on** a superconducting microwave link between two packaged nodes, **employing** a transmon qutrit and a transmission line **to address/solve** the deterministic transfer of a qutrit state beyond the qubit limit.
7. **The study focuses on** the jellium model of superconductivity, **employing** the dielectric formalism of Kirzhnits, Maksimov, and Khomskii (KMK) with analytical and numerical analysis **to address/solve** the determination of the superconducting transition temperature (Tc) as a function of electron density.
8. **The study focuses on** quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads, **employing** a time-local nonequilibrium Green's function formulation **to address/solve** the computational challenge of propagating nonlocal memory kernels in the Kadanoff-Baym equations.
9. **The study focuses on** infinite-layer nickelates, **employing** a chemical doping avenue **to address/solve** the manipulation and understanding of field-reentrant superconductivity and its rivalry with unconventional superconductivity.
10. **The study focuses on** high-Tc superconductivity in cuprates, **employing** a theoretical analysis of the Three Bands Hubbard Model (3BHM) for the CuO₂ planes **to address/solve** the identification of the essential physical processes underlying the phenomenon.
11. **The study focuses on** a proximitized quantum dot in a Ge/SiGe heterostructure, **employing** on-chip microwave measurements **to address/solve** the investigation of

### spin glass (2 new today)

1.  **The study focuses on** the generalized Ising problem, **employing** a polynomial relaxation to **address/solve** the challenge of preserving one-flip local minima, establishing a landscape equivalence theorem.
2.  **The study focuses on** the quantum Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) and 2D Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass models, **employing** deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics to **address/solve** the estimation of ground state energies for large system sizes.

| 1 | **[Ultrasound Evidence for a Low-Temperature Anomaly Inside the Superconducting State of 4Hb-TaS$_2$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30502v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report low-temperature ultrasound measurements on single crystals of the layered van der Waals superconductor 4Hb-TaS$_2$. Specific heat and ac magnetic susceptibility show a sharp bulk superconducting transition at $T_{\rm c}\approx 2.9$~K. Ultrasound measurements reveal an additional anomaly deep inside the superconducting state near $T^{*}\approx 1$~K. The most direct signature is observed in the relative ultrasonic attenuation change $Δα$: instead of being rapidly suppressed at $T_{\rm c}$, $Δα$ remains large throughout the intermediate superconducting regime and drops strongly only near $T^{*}$. This loss of acoustic dissipation is accompanied by a pronounced anomaly in the relative sound velocity change $Δv/v$, indicating strong coupling to the lattice. The low-temperature anomaly is rapidly suppressed by magnetic field and by Se substitution, suggesting a possible superconducting origin of the anomaly. We speculate that this feature may be related to induced superconductivity in the 1T layers.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了层状范德瓦尔斯超导体4Hb-TaS₂单晶的低温超声测量结果。比热和交流磁化率显示在$T_{\rm c}\approx 2.9$~K处存在尖锐的体超导转变。超声测量揭示在超导态内部靠近$T^{*}\approx 1$~K处存在额外异常。最直接的标志体现在相对超声衰减变化$Δα$中：$Δα$并未在$T_{\rm c}$处被迅速抑制，而是在中间超导区间保持较大值，仅在$T^{*}$附近急剧下降。这种声耗散的消失伴随着相对声速变化$Δv/v$的显著异常，表明与晶格存在强耦合。该低温异常可被磁场和硒替代迅速抑制，提示该异常可能源于超导。我们推测这一特征可能与1T层中的感应超导有关。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Yongwei Li et al. |
| 2 | **[Condensate Fraction Scaling and Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless Transition of Superconductivity and Superfluidity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.17411v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Characterizing the superconducting and superfluid transitions in two-dimensional (2D) many-body systems is of broad interest and remains a fundamental issue. In this study, we establish the {\it condensate fraction} scaling as a highly efficient tool to achieve that and accordingly propose efficient schemes to accurately determine the associated Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transitions. Using the 2D attractive Fermi-Hubbard model as a testbed and applying numerically exact auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we access unprecedented system sizes (up to $64\times 64 = 4096$ lattice sites) and perform a comprehensive analysis for the temperature dependence and finite-size scaling of {\it condensate fraction} across the BKT transition. We demonstrate that this quantity exhibits algebraic scaling below the transition and exponential scaling above it, with significantly reduced finite-size effects comparing to the extensively studied on-site pairing correlator. This greatly improves the determination of BKT transition using moderate system sizes. We also extract finite-size BKT transition temperature from condensate fraction, and confirm its logarithmic correction on system size. Based on the accurately determined transition, we reveal that the specific heat displays an anomaly, showing a peak at a temperature slightly above BKT transition. Our findings should be generally applicable to 2D fermionic and bosonic systems hosting superconductivity or superfluidity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>表征二维多体系统中的超导和超流转变具有广泛意义，且仍是一个基本问题。在本研究中，我们建立了{\it 凝聚分数}标度作为实现这一目标的高效工具，并据此提出精确确定相关Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) 转变的有效方案。以二维吸引性费米-哈伯德模型为测试平台，并应用数值精确的辅助场量子蒙特卡洛模拟，我们达到了前所未有的系统尺寸（高达$64\times 64 = 4096$个格点），并对BKT转变前后的{\it 凝聚分数}进行了温度依赖性和有限尺寸标度的全面分析。我们证明该量在转变以下呈现代数标度，在转变以上呈现指数标度，且与广泛研究的在位配对关联函数相比，其有限尺寸效应显著减小。这极大地改进了使用中等系统尺寸确定BKT转变的精度。我们还从凝聚分数中提取了有限尺寸BKT转变温度，并确认了其对系统尺寸的对数修正。基于精确确定的转变，我们揭示了比热存在异常，在略高于BKT转变的温度处出现峰值。我们的发现应普遍适用于存在超导或超流的二维费米子和玻色子系统。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Yuan-Yao He et al. |
| 3 | **[Design Method of Quasi-Lumped Element Bandpass Filters Using Superconducting Coplanar Waveguide for Millimeter-Wave Multichroic Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29790v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>An on-chip band-defining filter coupled with a superconducting photon detector is a promising technology for developing multi-band imaging cameras at millimeter and submillimeter wavelengths. In this paper, we present the design of on-chip bandpass filters based on coplanar waveguide geometry, which can be easily integrated into large-format multi-band detector arrays. A lumped element filter design is suitable not only for achieving a compact footprint but also for suppressing harmonics to reduce band-to-band crosstalk in a multiplexer. However, the coplanar waveguide geometry and the photolithography process rule limit the maximum available inductance and capacitance of lumped elements, which does not sufficiently meet the requirements of filter circuits. To overcome this limitation, we have established a design method for quasi-lumped element filters, in which the maximum element size is relaxed to a quarter wavelength, exceeding the ideal lumped element size. We achieved design solutions for 150, 220, and 270 GHz 8th-order Chebyshev bandpass filters and a triplexer. We also report on the measurement results of a scaled model of the bandpass filter, demonstrating the validity of our proposed filter design.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>与超导光子探测器集成的片上波段定义滤波器，是开发毫米和亚毫米波段多波段成像相机的一项有前景的技术。本文中，我们介绍了基于共面波导几何结构的片上带通滤波器设计，该设计可轻松集成到大面积多波段探测器阵列中。集总元件滤波器设计不仅适用于实现紧凑的占地面积，还适用于抑制谐波以减少多路复用器中的波段间串扰。然而，共面波导几何结构和光刻工艺规则限制了集总元件的最大可用电感和电容，这不足以满足滤波器电路的要求。为克服这一限制，我们建立了一种准集总元件滤波器的设计方法，其中最大元件尺寸放宽至四分之一波长，超过了理想集总元件尺寸。我们实现了150、220和270 GHz的8阶切比雪夫带通滤波器及三工器的设计方案。我们还报告了带通滤波器缩比模型的测量结果，证明了我们提出的滤波器设计的有效性。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Shinsuke Uno et al. |
| 4 | **[Unconventional Superconductivity in the Chiral Topological Semimetal Ag2Pd3S](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29767v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Chiral crystals provide a unique setting where broken inversion symmetry, strong spin-orbit coupling, and electronic topology intertwine, yet superconductivity in intrinsically chiral materials remains rare. Here, we report unconventional superconductivity in the chiral topological semimetal Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S, an enantiomorphic analog of natural mineral coldwellite, crystallizing in the right-handed space group $P4_132$. Bulk superconductivity with a transition temperature $T_C = 1.1(2)$ K is confirmed by electrical resistivity, magnetization, and specific-heat measurements. Muon spin rotation and relaxation ($μ$SR) experiments reveal a fully gapped superconducting state that spontaneously time-reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking establishing Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as the first chiral topological semimetal superconductor exhibiting intrinsic TRS breaking. First-principles calculations uncover multiple multifold band crossings near the Fermi level, hosting Kramers-Weyl, double spin-1, and spin-3/2 quasiparticles with large topological charges. These unconventional fermions generate symmetry-protected topological surface states and underscore the nontrivial topology of the normal state. Symmetry analysis based on the Ginzburg-Landau theory suggests a loop-supercurrent-ordered superconducting state, yielding a full gap alongside spontaneous TRS breaking. The coexistence of TRS-breaking superconductivity and chiral multifold fermions identifies Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as a platform for realizing intrinsic superconducting diode effects and chirality-induced spin selectivity, offering a transformative pathway toward dissipationless topological quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>手性晶体提供了一个独特的平台，其中破缺的反演对称性、强自旋-轨道耦合和电子拓扑相互交织，然而在本质手性材料中的超导性仍然罕见。在此，我们报道了手性拓扑半金属Ag₂Pd₃S中的非常规超导性，该材料是天然矿物冷硫钯矿的对映异构类似物，结晶于右手空间群$P4_132$。通过电阻率、磁化率和比热测量，确认了转变温度$T_C = 1.1(2)$ K的体超导性。μ子自旋旋转与弛豫实验揭示了一个完全能隙的超导态，该态自发破缺时间反演对称性，使Ag₂Pd₃S成为首个展现本征时间反演对称性破缺的手性拓扑半金属超导体。第一性原理计算揭示了费米能级附近的多个多重能带交叉，承载具有大拓扑荷的克莱默斯-外尔、双自旋-1和自旋-3/2准粒子。这些非常规费米子产生了对称性保护的拓扑表面态，并强调了正常态的非平庸拓扑。基于金兹堡-朗道理论的对称性分析表明存在一个环超流有序的超导态，在产生完全能隙的同时伴随自发时间反演对称性破缺。时间反演对称性破缺超导性与手性多重费米子的共存，将Ag₂Pd₃S确立为实现本征超导二极管效应和手性诱导自旋选择性的平台，为迈向无耗散拓扑量子技术提供了一条变革性路径。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Roshan Kumar Kushwaha et al. |
| 5 | **[Pattern recognition with superconducting wirelet neurons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.14330v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Neuromorphic computing aims to reproduce the energy efficiency and adaptability of biological intelligence in hardware. Superconducting devices are an attractive platform due to their ultra-low dissipation and fast switching dynamics. Here we employ a resistively shunted superconducting wirelet as a minimal artificial neuron for temporal neuromorphic computation. This simple architecture enables straightforward fabrication, electronic control, and high scalability. Through experiments and advanced simulations, we show that it exhibits spiking voltage dynamics driven by the interplay of resistive switching and relaxation, with threshold, firing frequency, and refractory time tunable through applied current, temperature, and shunt resistance. We demonstrate neural network operation by synaptically training temporal voltage signals generated by individual neurons. In this approach, trainable temporal weights act directly on the time-dependent wirelet-neuron responses rather than on static neuron outputs alone, allowing the computation to exploit the full temporal structure of the superconducting spikes. As an illustrative example, we apply this framework to handwritten digit recognition and show accurate classification using only three superconducting wirelet neurons. We further discuss on-chip training based on related gated wirelets as tunable synaptic elements, establishing shunted superconducting wirelets as scalable, energy-efficient building blocks for cryogenic artificial intelligence hardware that can be integrated with other emerging superconducting technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>神经形态计算旨在硬件中复现生物智能的能量效率和适应性。超导器件因其超低耗散和快速开关动力学而成为一个有吸引力的平台。在此，我们采用一个带电阻分流的超导细线作为用于时间性神经形态计算的最小化人工神经元。这种简单的架构便于制造、电子控制和高可扩展性。通过实验和先进模拟，我们展示了其展现出由阻性开关与弛豫相互作用驱动的尖峰电压动力学，其阈值、发放频率和不应期可通过施加电流、温度和分流电阻进行调节。我们通过突触训练单个神经元产生的时间性电压信号，演示了神经网络操作。在这种方法中，可训练的时间性权重直接作用于与时间相关的细线-神经元响应，而非仅作用于静态神经元输出，从而使计算能够充分利用超导尖峰的完整时间结构。作为一个说明性示例，我们将此框架应用于手写数字识别，并展示了仅使用三个超导细线神经元即可实现准确分类。我们进一步讨论了基于相关门控细线作为可调突触元件的片上训练，确立了带分流超导细线作为可扩展、节能的低温人工智能硬件基本构建单元，并可与其他新兴超导技术集成。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Khalil Harrabi et al. |
| 6 | **[A superconducting qutrit link beyond the qubit limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29475v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microwave links have enabled deterministic state transfer and remote entanglement between qubits, but deterministic links have so far operated with an effectively two-dimensional transmitted Hilbert space. Here we demonstrate a superconducting qutrit link between two independently packaged nodes connected by a microwave channel. Each node combines a transmon qutrit, a transmission resonator, and a tunable Purcell-filter interface, allowing the two remote microwave-photon interfaces to be matched in both frequency and bandwidth. We implement two transition-selective photon-mediated operations that transfer the $|e\rangle$ and $|f\rangle$ qutrit components in distinct temporal modes of the same channel. We tomographically characterize arbitrary qutrit-state transfer, obtaining a mean transferred-state fidelity of 83.68% and a qutrit process fidelity of 77.12%, exceeding both the classical qutrit-transfer benchmark and the best possible average fidelity of an effective qubit channel used to transmit an arbitrary qutrit. Using partial-transfer operations, we reconstruct a remote two-qutrit state with negativity 0.730, a tomography-inferred dense-coding capacity of 2.273 bits, and a tomography-inferred Collins-Gisin-Linden-Massar-Popescu (CGLMP) parameter $I_3=2.332$, all beyond the corresponding qubit or local bounds. These results demonstrate a superconducting microwave link that uses the native three-level structure of transmons as a genuine high-dimensional communication resource.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微波链路已实现量子比特间的确定性态转移与远程纠缠，但迄今为止确定性链路仅在有效二维希尔伯特空间中运行。本文演示了通过微波信道连接的两个独立封装节点间的超导qutrit链路。每个节点包含一个transmon qutrit、一个传输谐振器和一个可调谐Purcell滤波接口，使得两个远程微波-光子接口在频率和带宽上均可匹配。我们实现了两种跃迁选择性光子介导操作，将$|e\rangle$和$|f\rangle$ qutrit分量转移至同一信道的不同时间模式中。通过层析成像表征任意qutrit态转移，获得平均转移态保真度83.68%和qutrit过程保真度77.12%，超过经典qutrit转移基准以及用于传输任意qutrit的有效量子比特信道的最大可能平均保真度。利用部分转移操作，我们重构了远程两qutrit态，其负性度为0.730，层析推断密集编码容量为2.273比特，层析推断Collins-Gisin-Linden-Massar-Popescu（CGLMP）参数$I_3=2.332$，均超越相应量子比特或局域界限。这些结果证明超导微波链路可将transmon的天然三能级结构作为真正的高维通信资源加以利用。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Xiang Li et al. |
| 7 | **[Superconductivity in Jellium Model Revisited](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29306v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We reanalyze superconductivity in jellium model within the dielectric formalism developed by Kirzhnits, Maksimov, and Khomskii (KMK), which is probably the most reliable approach to this model. The linearized KMK integral equation for superconducting transition temperature is analyzed analytically and solved numerically by direct diagonalization to obtain $T_c$ dependence on Wigner - Seitz radius $r_s$. As a first systematic extension beyond random - phase approximation (RPA), static Hubbard local - field corrections are incorporated into the dielectric function. Our results in general narrow the interval of possible $T_c$ values in comparison with widely scattered results of some of the previous works. For the case of metallic hydrogen our calculations show $T_c(r_s)$ dependence with characteristic dome with maximum of $T_c$ at $r_s\sim$ 9.0 of the order of some fractions of Kelvin only, despite the naive expectations based on the high values of pairing Boson frequency. This is due to the weak - coupling regime of superconductivity in jellium model at all densities.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在Kirzhnits、Maksimov和Khomskii（KMK）发展的介电形式框架内重新分析了凝胶模型中的超导电性，该形式可能是处理此模型最可靠的方法。通过解析分析和直接对角化数值求解线性化KMK积分方程，获得了超导转变温度$T_c$对Wigner-Seitz半径$r_s$的依赖关系。作为超越随机相位近似（RPA）的首个系统性扩展，我们将静态Hubbard局域场修正纳入介电函数。与先前部分工作中分散的结果相比，我们的结果总体上缩小了$T_c$可能值的区间。对于金属氢情形，计算显示$T_c(r_s)$呈现特征穹顶依赖关系，最大$T_c$出现在$r_s\sim$ 9.0处，仅达开尔文量级几分之一，这与基于配对玻色子高频的朴素预期相悖。这是由于凝胶模型在所有密度下均处于超导弱耦合区间。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Michael V. Sadovskii et al. |
| 8 | **[Time-local nonequilibrium Green's function method for real-time dynamics in quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29266v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We develop a time-local nonequilibrium Green's function formulation for real-time dynamics in quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads. The superconducting lead self-energy is a strongly frequency-dependent matrix in Nambu space, giving rise to nonlocal memory kernels in the time domain. This makes direct propagation of the Kadanoff-Baym (KB) equations computationally demanding. To overcome this difficulty, we extend the auxiliary-mode expansion, originally developed for normal-metal leads, to Nambu-space self-energies. This allows us to decompose the superconducting lead self-energy into a finite number of exponential modes and to transform the KB equations with memory integrals into a closed set of ordinary differential equations. The resulting time-local equations enable efficient real-time simulations under general time-dependent bias voltages, superconducting phases, and one-body Hamiltonians of the central system, while retaining the memory effects induced by superconducting leads. As an application, we analyze voltage-quench dynamics in a superconductor-quantum-dot-superconductor junction and show that, after a dc bias is suddenly applied, the system evolves through a transient regime and relaxes to an ac Josephson periodic steady state. The resulting periodic steady-state current agrees with the Floquet Green's function solution, validating the present real-time formulation.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们发展了用于耦合超导引线量子系统实时动力学的时间局域非平衡格林函数形式。超导引线自能是Nambu空间中强频率依赖的矩阵，在时域中产生非定域记忆核，这使得直接传播Kadanoff-Baym（KB）方程计算代价高昂。为克服此困难，我们将最初针对正常金属引线发展的辅助模展开方法扩展至Nambu空间自能。这使我们能够将超导引线自能分解为有限数量的指数模，并将含记忆积分的KB方程转化为封闭的常微分方程组。所得时间局域方程可在一般时变偏压、超导相位和中心系统单体哈密顿量下实现高效实时模拟，同时保留超导引线诱导的记忆效应。作为应用，我们分析了超导体-量子点-超导体结中的电压猝灭动力学，表明在突然施加直流偏压后，系统经历瞬态过程并弛豫至交流约瑟夫森周期稳态。所得周期稳态电流与Floquet格林函数解一致，验证了本实时形式的有效性。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Taira Kawamura et al. |
| 9 | **[A chemical avenue to manipulate field-reentrant superconducting rivalries in infinite layer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.22026v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recently, preliminary magnetic field-reentrant superconductivity manifested in high-temperature (Tc) Eu-doped infinite-layer (IL) nickelates, beyond analogous discoveries exclusively in low-Tc systems. This evokes intriguing fundamental issues about potential quantum-phase boundary and criticality between unconventional superconductivity and field-reentrant-one, which are inexplicable owing to formidable challenges in growing IL-nickelates towards later-series rare-earths. Herein, we open up chemical avenues to enable effective growth of (RE1-yRE'y)1-xEuxNiO2 (RE/RE': Pr, Nd, Sm, Gd, Dy), giving rise to discoveries of RE-4f-related quantum competition between high-Tc and reentrant superconductivity. Robust magnetic-field-reentrant superconductivity with uniaxial anisotropy is observed at superconducting-dome boundaries, stemming from Eu2+-4f7 associated competition between magnetic-fluctuation promoted pairing and exchange-field interactions. Their quantum-criticality is further modulable via RE(RE')-magnetism, which either reinforces reentrancy or elevates Tc (40.1 K) with more robust critical-current-density (~266 kA/cm2 at 2 K) beyond Sr-/Ca-doped counterparts. Our synthetic route enables the establishment of an ideal platform via IL-nickelates for studying 4f-related unconventional superconductivity and quantum-criticality.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期，高温（Tc）Eu掺杂无限层（IL）镍酸盐中初步展现出磁场可重入超导电性，超越了此前仅在低温Tc系统中的类似发现。这引发了关于非常规超导与场致重入超导之间潜在量子相边界与临界性的基础问题，但由于生长后期稀土系列IL镍酸盐面临巨大挑战，这些现象尚无法解释。本文开辟了化学途径以实现（RE1-yRE'y）1-xEuxNiO2（RE/RE'：Pr、Nd、Sm、Gd、Dy）的有效生长，从而发现了与RE-4f相关的高Tc与重入超导之间的量子竞争。在超导穹顶边界处观察到具有单轴各向异性的稳健磁场重入超导电性，其源于Eu2+-4f7关联的磁涨落促进配对与交换场相互作用之间的竞争。其量子临界性可通过RE（RE'）磁性进一步调控，该磁性或增强重入性，或提升Tc（40.1 K）并具有更稳健的临界电流密度（2 K下约266 kA/cm²），超越Sr/Ca掺杂对应物。我们的合成路线通过IL镍酸盐为研究4f相关非常规超导与量子临界性建立了理想平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Haowen Han et al. |
| 10 | **[Theory of High-Tc Superconductivity in Cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28906v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The essential physical processes underlying the phenomenon of High-Tc superconductivity in cuprates occur in the $CuO_2$ planes, found in these materials. The dynamics of the active electrons belonging to such planes is well described by the Three Bands Hubbard Model (3BHM). The complexity of such model, however, led the researchers to look for simpler and yet relevant alternatives. In the attempts to circumvent the complexity of this model,two main simplified versions of the (3BHM) were considered. In the first alternative, one eliminates the doped holes and their respective sub-lattices by tying them to the $Cu^{++}$ electrons, thereby forming the so called Zhang-Rice singlets. The remaining dynamics consists in doping a Mott-Hubbard insulator and is described by the t-J Model. The second alternative maintains that the $Cu^{++}$ electrons form a square lattice of localized spins, while the doped holes move along the oxygen sub-lattices and undergo a Kondo like magnetic interaction with the localized spins, besides the Hubbard-like electric repulsion. This scenario is described by the Spin-Fermion-Hubbard Model. Most of the researchers in the field chose to follow the first road, while, I chose the second one. In this article I review in detail the reasons why that choice has led to a successful theory for High-Tc superconductivity in hole doped cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>铜氧化物高温超导现象的基本物理过程发生在这些材料中的$CuO_2$面内。描述这些面内活性电子动力学的有效模型是三带Hubbard模型（3BHM）。然而该模型的复杂性促使研究者寻找更简单且仍具相关性的替代方案。在规避此模型复杂性的尝试中，主要考虑了3BHM的两种简化版本。第一种方案通过将掺杂空穴及其子晶格束缚于$Cu^{++}$电子形成所谓的Zhang-Rice单态，从而消除它们。剩余动力学描述的是掺杂Mott-Hubbard绝缘体，由t-J模型刻画。第二种方案认为$Cu^{++}$电子形成局域自旋的方晶格，而掺杂空穴沿氧子晶格运动，除Hubbard型电排斥外，还与局域自旋发生近藤型磁相互作用。此场景由自旋-费米子-Hubbard模型描述。该领域多数研究者选择第一条路径，而我选择了第二条。本文详细回顾了为何这一选择导向了空穴掺杂铜氧化物高温超导的成功理论。</p></details> | 2026-06-27 | E. C. Marino et al. |
| 11 | **[Multi-level π-junction in a proximitized Ge/SiGe quantum dot probed by an on-chip superconducting microwave resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28762v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Using on-chip microwave measurements, we investigate multilevel $π$-junctions formed by proximitized quantum dot (QD) in a germanium (Ge)/silicon-germanium (SiGe) heterostructure. In the multilevel regime, where several QD orbitals contribute simultaneously to superconducting transport, the Josephson ground state is no longer determined solely by the occupation of a single orbital. By combining DC transport and microwave techniques, we identify the qualitative signatures of multilevel $π$-junctions in both their gate-voltage dependence and microwave response. In particular, we observe combinations phase transitions that are sharp or smooth in gate voltage and which exhibit distinct inductive and dissipative signatures. Such multilevel Josephson transport has previously been observed primarily in exceptionally clean systems such as carbon nanotubes. Our results establish proximitized Ge as a platform for investigating hybrid superconductor/semiconductor physics and demonstrate the integration of gate-defined superconducting quantum devices with high-quality on-chip microwave resonators.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用片上微波测量技术，研究了锗/硅锗异质结构中由邻近效应诱导的量子点形成的多能级π结。在多能级体系中，多个量子点轨道同时参与超导输运，此时约瑟夫森基态不再仅由单个轨道的占据数决定。通过结合直流输运与微波技术，我们识别出多能级π结在栅压依赖性和微波响应中的定性特征。特别地，我们观察到栅压变化下呈现尖锐或平滑的相变组合，并表现出独特的电感和耗散特征。此类多能级约瑟夫森输运此前主要见于碳纳米管等极端洁净系统。我们的研究结果确立了邻近效应诱导的锗作为研究超导/半导体混合物理的平台，并展示了将栅极定义超导量子器件与高品质片上微波谐振器集成的可行性。</p></details> | 2026-06-27 | Luigi Ruggiero et al. |
| 12 | **[Distinct Roles of Hydrogen in Superconducting and Ferromagnetic Phases of CoZr$_{2}$H$_{x}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28726v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Hydrogenation offers a versatile route to tuning the physical properties of intermetallic compounds. In this study, we synthesized CoZr$_{2}$H$_{x}$ with different hydrogen contents and found that hydrogen is incorporated in two distinct concentration regimes separated by a wide composition gap: a low-concentration hydrogenated superconducting phase ($x$ = 0-0.054) and a high-concentration hydrogenated ferromagnetic phase ($x$ = 2.786). Hydrogen plays fundamentally different roles in the two concentration regimes. In the high hydrogen concentration phase, the Zr-H interactions substantially modify the metallic bands crossing the Fermi level, leading to the emergence of ferromagnetism. In contrast, in the low hydrogen concentration phase, hydrogen behaves as a nonmagnetic impurity without altering the electronic band structure. Despite the nearly identical Debye temperatures across the low-concentration series, the superconducting transition temperature ($T_{\mathrm{c}}$) is progressively suppressed with increasing hydrogen content.The observed $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ suppression is quantitatively described by the Abrikosov-Gor'kov pair-breaking theory, indicating that the superconducting gap of CoZr$_{2}$ is anisotropic or multigap rather than a fully isotropic $s$-wave symmetry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>氢化为调控金属间化合物的物理性质提供了一种通用途径。本研究合成了不同氢含量的CoZr₂Hₓ，发现氢以两个被宽组分间隙分隔的浓度区间掺入：低浓度氢化超导相（x=0-0.054）和高浓度氢化铁磁相（x=2.786）。氢在两个浓度区间中发挥根本不同的作用。在高氢浓度相中，Zr-H相互作用显著修饰了穿越费米能级的金属能带，导致铁磁性出现。相反，在低氢浓度相中，氢表现为非磁性杂质而不改变电子能带结构。尽管低浓度系列中德拜温度几乎相同，但超导转变温度（Tc）随氢含量增加而逐步被抑制。观测到的Tc抑制可由阿布里科索夫-戈尔科夫对破缺理论定量描述，表明CoZr₂的超导能隙具有各向异性或多能隙特征，而非完全各向同性的s波对称性。</p></details> | 2026-06-27 | Yuto Watanabe et al. |
| 13 | **[Improving the lifetime of aluminum-based superconducting qubits through atomic layer etching and deposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17474v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a dry surface treatment combining atomic layer etching and deposition (ALE and ALD) to mitigate dielectric loss in fully fabricated superconducting quantum devices formed from aluminum thin films on silicon. The treatment, performed as a final processing step prior to device packaging, starts by conformally removing the native metal oxide and fabrication residues from the exposed surfaces through ALE before \textit{in situ} encapsulating the metal surfaces with a thin dielectric layer using ALD. We measure a two-fold reduction in loss attributed to two-level system (TLS) absorption in treated aluminum-based resonators and planar transmon qubits. Treated transmons with compact capacitor plates and gaps achieve median $Q$ and $T_1$ values of $3.69 \pm 0.42 \times 10^6$ and $196 \pm 22$~$μ$s, respectively. These improvements were found to be sustained over several months. We discuss how the combination of ALE and ALD reverses fabrication-induced surface damages to significantly and durably improve device performance via a reduction of the TLS defect density in the capacitive elements.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出一种结合原子层刻蚀与沉积的干法表面处理技术，以降低硅衬底上铝薄膜制备的全集成超导量子器件的介电损耗。该处理作为器件封装前的最终工艺步骤，首先通过原子层刻蚀保形去除暴露表面的原生金属氧化物及制备残留物，随后利用原子层沉积原位包覆金属表面薄介电层。经处理的铝基谐振器与平面transmon量子比特中，由二能级系统吸收导致的损耗降低至原先的一半。采用紧凑电容极板与间隙的经处理transmon，其中位品质因数Q与能量弛豫时间T₁分别达到（3.69±0.42）×10⁶和（196±22）微秒。这些性能提升可持续数月之久。我们讨论了原子层刻蚀与沉积的组合如何逆转制备诱导的表面损伤，通过降低电容元件中的二能级系统缺陷密度，显著且持久地改善器件性能。</p></details> | 2026-06-26 | Neha Mahuli et al. |
| 14 | **[Current-induced re-entrant superconductivity and extreme nonreciprocal superconducting diode effect in valley-polarized systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.00835v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) refers to the nonreciprocity of superconducting critical currents. Generally, the SDE has a positive and a negative critical currents jc+- corresponding to two opposite directions with unequal amplitudes. It is demonstrated that an extreme nonreciprocity where two critical currents can become both positive (or negative) has been observed in twisted graphene systems. In this work, we theoretically propose a possible mechanism to realize an extreme nonreciprocal SDE. Based on a simple microscopic model, we demonstrate that depairing currents required to dissolve Cooper pairs can be remodulated under the interplay between valley polarizations and applied currents. Near the disappearance of the superconductivity, the remodulation is shown to induce extreme nonreciprocity and also the current-induced re-entrant superconductivity where the system has two different critical current intervals. Our study may provide new horizons for understanding the coexistence of superconductivity and spontaneous valley polarizations, and pave a way for designing SDE with 100% efficiency</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）是指超导临界电流的非互易性。通常，SDE具有正负临界电流jc+和jc-，分别对应两个相反方向且幅值不相等。研究表明，在扭曲石墨烯体系中观测到了一种极端非互易性，即两个临界电流可同时变为正（或负）。在本工作中，我们从理论上提出了一种实现极端非互易SDE的可能机制。基于一个简单的微观模型，我们证明了在谷极化和外加电流的相互作用下，用于拆散库珀对的退配对电流可以被重新调制。在超导电性消失附近，这种重新调制可诱导出极端非互易性，以及电流诱导的重入超导电性——此时系统具有两个不同的临界电流区间。我们的研究可能为理解超导电性与自发谷极化共存提供新视角，并为设计100%效率的SDE铺平道路。</p></details> | 2026-06-26 | Yu-Chen Zhuang et al. |
| 15 | **[Initial demonstration of a quantum heat engine based on dissipation-engineered superconducting circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.20143v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum heat engines require precise control over thermal reservoirs and the energies of the quantum working medium. Although superconducting circuits enable accurate engineering of controlled quantum systems, they have not yet been employed to experimentally realize a cyclic quantum heat engine. Here, we demonstrate a quantum heat engine with superconducting circuits, using a quantum-circuit refrigerator as a tunable heat reservoir and a flux-tunable transmon qubit as the working medium. Starting from a thermal state, we implement a few quantum Otto cycles with a tailored reservoir drive inducing sequential cooling and heating, interleaved with flux ramps controlling qubit frequency. Utilizing single-shot qubit readout, we monitor the qubit state evolution during the cycles and measure positive output powers and efficiencies, agreeing with corresponding simulations. Our results verify thermodynamic models of quantum heat engines, advance control of thermal environments, and open avenues for exploring possible quantum advantages.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子热机需要对热库和量子工作介质的能量进行精确控制。尽管超导电路能够实现受控量子系统的精确工程化，但尚未被用于实验实现循环量子热机。在此，我们展示了一种基于超导电路的量子热机，采用量子电路制冷器作为可调热库，以磁通可调的transmon量子比特作为工作介质。从热态出发，我们通过定制的热库驱动实现若干量子奥托循环，该驱动产生交替的冷却与加热过程，其间穿插控制量子比特频率的磁通斜坡。利用单次量子比特读取，我们监测循环过程中量子比特的状态演化，并测量到正的输出功率和效率，与相应模拟结果一致。我们的结果验证了量子热机的热力学模型，推进了对热环境的控制，并为探索可能的量子优势开辟了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-06-26 | Tuomas Uusnäkki et al. |
| 16 | **[Thickness dependence of diode efficiency in superconducting Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe thin-film heterostructure devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27639v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) is a nonreciprocal transport phenomenon, in which the superconducting critical current density depends on the polarity of the current. It has attracted recent attention because of its potential applications to a rectifier without energy dissipation. While SDE has been observed in a wide range of superconducting materials with broken inversion symmetry as well as thin-film heterostructures, the microscopic origin linking structural inversion asymmetry of electronic band, spin-orbit interaction, and vortex pinning remains to be clarified. In this study, we investigate SDE in Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe heterostructure devices as a function of the superconducting Fe(Se,Te) layer thickness tFST to elucidate the role of structural inversion asymmetry on the vortex-induced SDE. We find that the SDE efficiency monotonically increases with increasing tFST, which can be understood by considering that the band bending in the bulk Fe(Se,Te) layer induces the structural inversion asymmetry and thus, the Rashba spin-orbit interaction. In addition, we demonstrate almost 100% rectification for the Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe heterostructure devices in half- and full-wave oscillation configurations. Our findings point out the importance of structural architecture for realization of highly efficient SDE devices based on superconducting thin-film heterostructures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）是一种非互易输运现象，其中超导临界电流密度取决于电流的极性。由于其潜在的无能耗整流器应用，该效应近期引起了广泛关注。尽管SDE已在多种具有反演对称性破缺的超导材料及薄膜异质结构中被观测到，但连接电子能带结构反演不对称性、自旋轨道相互作用与涡旋钉扎的微观起源仍有待阐明。在本研究中，我们研究了Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe异质结构器件中SDE随超导Fe(Se,Te)层厚度tFST的变化关系，以阐明结构反演不对称性对涡旋诱导SDE的作用。我们发现SDE效率随tFST增加而单调增大，这可通过考虑体Fe(Se,Te)层中的能带弯曲诱导结构反演不对称性，进而产生Rashba自旋轨道相互作用来理解。此外，我们展示了Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe异质结构器件在半波和全波振荡配置中实现了接近100%的整流效率。我们的发现指出了结构架构对于实现基于超导薄膜异质结构的高效SDE器件的重要性。</p></details> | 2026-06-26 | Kaito Arizono et al. |
| 17 | **[Tomographic imaging of superconducting order using particle-hole interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.16168v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting phases with exotic symmetries that differ from the underlying crystalline lattice are at the focus of superconductivity research. Yet, despite intense interest, detecting the order parameter symmetry and topology remains a major challenge. Real-space imaging near atomic impurities with scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) has been highly successful in revealing nodes of the superconducting gap, in particular in cuprate superconductors, however the order parameter phase winding has so far remained inaccessible by STM techniques. We demonstrate that STM can access this phase information by exploiting Young-type quasiparticle interference patterns generated by pairs of impurities acting as beam splitters. Superconducting order parameter tomography (SOPT), a technique proposed here, utilizes the response of real-space interference patterns of Bogoliubov quasiparticles to the controlled rotation of impurity configurations, allowing us to reconstruct the momentum space structure of the gap function $Δ(\vec{k})$. As a concrete example, we consider Strontium Ruthenate, whose superconducting order remains a subject of ongoing debate, and demonstrate how SOPT can distinguish between competing order parameter candidates. The Young's interference fringes, nodal directions, and rotating beams, detected by SOPT, encode information about both the nodes and phase winding of the superconducting order parameter. This method provides a broadly applicable route to identifying unconventional and topological superconductivity and establishes particle-hole interference as a new imaging modality for superconducting order.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>具有与底层晶格不同奇特对称性的超导相是超导研究的焦点。然而，尽管备受关注，探测序参量对称性和拓扑结构仍是一项重大挑战。利用扫描隧道显微镜（STM）在原子杂质附近进行实空间成像，在揭示超导能隙节点（尤其是铜氧化物超导体）方面取得了巨大成功，但序参量的相位缠绕迄今仍无法通过STM技术获取。我们证明，STM可通过利用由充当分束器的杂质对产生的杨氏型准粒子干涉图案来获取这一相位信息。本文提出的超导序参量断层扫描（SOPT）技术，利用博戈留波夫准粒子实空间干涉图案对杂质构型受控旋转的响应，能够重构能隙函数$Δ(\vec{k})$的动量空间结构。以序参量仍存争议的钌酸锶为例，我们展示了SOPT如何区分相互竞争的候选序参量。SOPT探测到的杨氏干涉条纹、节线方向和旋转光束，编码了超导序参量的节点与相位缠绕信息。该方法为识别非常规超导和拓扑超导提供了广泛适用的途径，并将粒子-空穴干涉确立为超导序参量的一种新型成像模式。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Archisman Panigrahi et al. |
| 18 | **[Elimination of Flux Trapping in Superconducting Circuits in Ambient Magnetic Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27415v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductor digital electronics and quantum computing with superconducting qubits are promising next-generation computing technologies. When cooled down or operated in the presence of a nonzero background magnetic field $B_r$, superconducting thin films comprising the circuits can trap magnetic vortices that can degrade circuit or qubit performance. In this work, we report a practical solution for eliminating flux trapped during cooldown in ambient magnetic fields, $B_r\leq 60$ $\upmu$T, based on controlled local thermal gradients and moats, etched holes in the superconducting films of the circuit. Thermal gradients created by integrated on-chip resistive heaters move vortices towards the moats, where they become trapped away from circuitry regions and pinning sites. Using magnetic imaging and electrical circuit readout, we demonstrate that this approach is capable of removing magnetic flux trapped during field cooling and magnetic flux nucleated by circuit operation. If used in an environment with basic magnetic shielding, this solution is capable of suppressing all magnetic flux in a large-scale circuit, overcoming one of the long-standing challenges preventing high-performance scalable computing using superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导数字电子学和基于超导量子比特的量子计算是前景广阔的新一代计算技术。当含有超导薄膜的电路在非零背景磁场Br下冷却或运行时，薄膜中可能俘获磁涡旋，从而降低电路或量子比特的性能。在本工作中，我们报告了一种实用的解决方案，用于消除在环境磁场Br≤60 μT下冷却过程中俘获的磁通，该方法基于受控的局部热梯度和沟槽（在电路超导薄膜上刻蚀的孔洞）。集成在芯片上的电阻加热器产生的热梯度将涡旋移向沟槽，使其被俘获在远离电路区域和钉扎位点的地方。利用磁成像和电路读出，我们证明了该方法能够移除场冷却过程中俘获的磁通以及电路运行产生的磁通。若在具有基本磁屏蔽的环境中使用，该方案能够抑制大规模电路中的所有磁通，从而克服了阻碍利用超导体实现高性能可扩展计算的长期挑战之一。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Rohan T. Kapur et al. |
| 19 | **[Strong coupling between propagating spin wave and microwave photons in a superconducting resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27279v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate strong coupling between propagating spin wave modes and microwave photons in superconducting resonator-magnetic thin film hybrid circuits. By fabricating the resonator directly on yttrium iron garnet thin films grown on rare-earth-free Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$ substrates, we achieve strong coupling of both Damon-Eshbach and backward-volume spin wave modes to the resonator, with coupling strengths exceeding both the magnon and photon damping rates. Furthermore, we observe nonreciprocal spin wave radiation of the hybrid magnonic mode in the Damon-Eshbach configuration, highlighting the potential for incorporating intrinsic spin-wave nonreciprocity into hybrid magnonic systems. These results open new avenues for integrating spin-wave magnonics with cavity magnonics, and for harnessing spin waves for potential applications in quantum information science.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们证明了在超导谐振器-磁性薄膜混合电路中，传播自旋波模式与微波光子之间的强耦合。通过将谐振器直接制备在生长于无稀土Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$衬底的钇铁石榴石薄膜上，我们实现了达蒙-埃什巴赫模式和反向体自旋波模式与谐振器的强耦合，其耦合强度超过磁振子和光子的阻尼率。此外，我们在达蒙-埃什巴赫构型中观测到混合磁振子模式的非互易自旋波辐射，凸显了将本征自旋波非互易性融入混合磁振子系统的潜力。这些结果为整合自旋波磁振子学与腔磁振子学，以及利用自旋波在量子信息科学中的潜在应用开辟了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Yi Li et al. |
| 20 | **[Spin-orbit coupling driven topological superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene-WSe$_2$ heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27013v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Commencing from the low-energy Bistritzer-MacDonald continuum model of twisted bi-layer graphene (tBLG) with proximity-induced Ising, Rashba, and intrinsic spin-orbit couplings (SOCs), we construct the corresponding Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian with conventional $s$-wave pairing and theoretically investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity in it. The latter can possibly be experimentally demonstrated in tBLG, Niobium and tungsten diselenide heterostructures. The topological superconducting phases, bearing an effective $p$-wave pairing profile and exhibiting inverted band dispersion, are protected by a bulk gap and are topologically characterized by Chern numbers. In the absence of intrinsic SOC, variation of the twist angle and other SOC strengths yield extended gapless, trivial, and topological phases, with phase boundaries exactly matching the closing of direct band gaps. The topological regime exhibits clear band inversion in the combined particle-hole and spin space, along with distinct Bloch localization profiles compared to the trivial phase. Including intrinsic SOC generates additional topological phases and eliminates the gapless phase, indicating the enhanced stability of the gapped topological superconducting regime in tBLG.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>从具有邻近效应诱导的伊辛、拉什巴和本征自旋轨道耦合（SOCs）的双层扭转石墨烯（tBLG）的低能比斯特里策-麦克唐纳连续模型出发，我们构建了包含传统$s$波配对的相应博戈留波夫-德热纳哈密顿量，并从理论上研究了其中拓扑超导性的出现。后者可能在tBLG、铌和二硒化钨异质结构中通过实验证实。具有有效$p$波配对轮廓并呈现能带色散反转的拓扑超导相，受体带隙保护，并以陈数为拓扑特征。在本征自旋轨道耦合缺失的情况下，扭转角及其他自旋轨道耦合强度的变化会产生扩展的无能隙相、平庸相和拓扑相，其相边界与直接带隙的闭合精确对应。拓扑区域在粒子-空穴和自旋组合空间中表现出清晰的能带反转，并与平庸相比具有独特的布洛赫局域化轮廓。引入本征自旋轨道耦合会额外产生拓扑相并消除无能隙相，表明tBLG中有能隙拓扑超导相的稳定性得到增强。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Kamalesh Bera et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Local-Minima-Preserving Continuous Relaxation of Ising Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30333v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The generalized Ising problem captures a broad spectrum of hard combinatorial problems, including MAX-CUT, Number Partitioning (NPP), and Maximum Independent Set. In this work, we consider the notion of one-flip local minima for this problem. We construct a polynomial relaxation and prove the landscape equivalence theorem: there exists a one-to-one correspondence between the local minima of the relaxation and the one-flip minima of the original Ising problem. This guarantee reduces the Ising problem to finding the local minima of a smooth function, allowing us to leverage gradient-based optimizers such as ADAM. We demonstrate that our method is scalable and it achieves strong performance across challenging benchmarks, including spin-glass models, MAX-CUT, and NPP.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>广义伊辛问题涵盖了包括最大割、数分割问题和最大独立集在内的广泛难解组合问题。本文针对该问题考虑单翻转局部极小值的概念。我们构造了一个多项式松弛并证明了景观等价定理：松弛问题的局部极小值与原始伊辛问题的单翻转极小值之间存在一一对应关系。这一保证将伊辛问题简化为寻找光滑函数的局部极小值，从而允许我们利用基于梯度的优化器（如ADAM）。实验表明，该方法具有可扩展性，并在自旋玻璃模型、最大割和数分割问题等具有挑战性的基准测试中取得了优异性能。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Debraj Banerjee et al. |
| 2 | **[Estimates of ground state energies for the quantum SK and 2D-EA models, using deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29875v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform large scale quantum annealing of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) spin glass up to a system size $N=40000$ to estimate its ground state energy using the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field quantum Ising dynamics, extending the earlier results (reported in Eur. Phys. J. B {\bf 98}, 226 (2025)). Here we numerically solve the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo annealing dynamics to obtain the spin configurations and subsequently the ground state energy for a given system size at the end of the annealing, starting from a quantum paramagnetic state. The method shows high efficiency, with an overall algorithmic cost of $O(N^3)$ in estimating the energy of the ground state. We later extend this quantum annealing study to estimate the ground state energies (starting again from the quantum paramagnetic phase, annealing down to any desired low value of the transverse field) for the Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass model on a square lattice.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用德热纳-铃木-久保平均场量子伊辛动力学，对系统规模达N=40000的谢林顿-柯克帕特里克自旋玻璃进行了大规模量子退火，以估算其基态能量，从而扩展了前期研究成果（发表于《欧洲物理杂志B》第98卷，226页，2025年）。本文通过数值求解德热纳-铃木-久保退火动力学，从量子顺磁态出发，获得退火结束时的自旋构型及对应系统规模的基态能量。该方法具有高效性，估算基态能量的总算法复杂度为O(N^3)。随后我们将该量子退火研究扩展至方格上的爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃模型（同样从量子顺磁相出发，退火至任意所需的低横向场值），以估算其基态能量。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Soumyaditya Das et al. |
| 3 | **[Critical Universality of the SU (2) Gauge Glass Model Analyzed by the Dynamical Scaling Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25618v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the critical phenomena of the three-dimensional (3D) $SU(2)$ gauge glass model, which can be regarded as the $O(4)$ spin-glass model with gauge symmetry. Using Monte Carlo simulations and the non-equilibrium relaxation method, we examine the critical behavior along phase boundaries across various degrees of disorder. Consistent with previous studies, we verify that weak disorder is irrelevant to the universality class; the critical behavior of the ferromagnetic-paramagnetic transition remains in the 3D $O(4)$ universality class of the pure ferromagnetic system. Additionally, we demonstrate that the paramagnetic-spin glass transition exhibits universal critical behavior independent of the disorder. Our findings provide valuable insights into the fundamental properties and universality of gauge glass models.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了三维SU(2)规范玻璃模型中的临界现象，该模型可视为具有规范对称性的O(4)自旋玻璃模型。通过蒙特卡洛模拟和非平衡弛豫方法，我们考察了沿不同无序程度相边界处的临界行为。与先前研究一致，我们验证了弱无序对普适类无关；铁磁-顺磁转变的临界行为仍属于纯铁磁系统的三维O(4)普适类。此外，我们证明顺磁-自旋玻璃转变表现出与无序程度无关的普适临界行为。这些发现为规范玻璃模型的基本性质与普适性提供了重要见解。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | Yosei Takada et al. |
| 4 | **[Offline Channel-Independent QAOA Angles for RIS Power Aggregation: Unit-Circle Phase Dictionaries and Infinite-Size Spin-Glass Limits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24540v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) maximize received power by setting per-element phases. Discrete-phase optimization is NP-hard in the worst case, while the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) applied to RIS faces limited phase alphabets, either per-problem angle optimization or uncharacterized training cost exposed to barren plateaus, and no scalable performance benchmark. We introduce a $2^{M}$-phase $θ$ dictionary for optimizing power $\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{jθ}\|^{2}$ having $K \times N$ channel matrix $\mathbf{A}$ and QAOA angle offline optimization with instance and size-independent infinite-size limit of the mixed-$q$ Gaussian ensemble of Basso et al. Our design bounds the spin-Hamiltonian interaction order to at most quartic for any $M$, and the deployed order-2 reduction lies below the even-$q\!\ge\!4$ regime in which constant-level QAOA limitations are proved. We perform analytical, state-vector, matrix-product-state and Pauli-path-simulation numerical studies for $N=K \leq 100$ and QAOA depth $p=9$, verifying offline angle transfer to Rayleigh, Rician/line-of-sight, cascaded double-fading and spatially-correlated RIS channels at $N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$. We observe performance reaching a near-optimal multi-start single-flip local-search reference for $N\!\le\!16$ under order-2 modeling with $2^{5}{=}32$-phase dictionary while the order-4 model shows a performance ceiling below the classical reference. The approach suggests a route to near-optimal large-$N$ performance on future fault-tolerant (FTQ) quantum computers, which enable the higher-depth QAOA circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>可重构智能表面通过设置每个单元的相位来最大化接收功率。离散相位优化在最坏情况下是NP难问题，而应用于RIS的量子近似优化算法面临有限的相位字母表、每个问题角度的优化或暴露于贫瘠高原的未表征训练成本，且缺乏可扩展的性能基准。我们引入一个$2^{M}$相位的$\theta$字典来优化功率$\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{j\theta}\|^{2}$，其中包含$K \times N$信道矩阵$\mathbf{A}$，以及基于Basso等人混合$q$高斯系综的实例无关且规模无关的无限大极限的QAOA角度离线优化。我们的设计将自旋哈密顿量相互作用阶数限制为对于任意$M$最多为四次，且所采用的二阶约简低于已证明存在恒定水平QAOA限制的偶$q\!\ge\!4$区域。我们对$N=K \leq 100$和QAOA深度$p=9$进行了分析、态矢量、矩阵乘积态和泡利路径模拟数值研究，验证了在$N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$时离线角度向瑞利、莱斯/视距、级联双衰落和空间相关RIS信道的迁移。我们观察到，在采用$2^{5}{=}32$相位字典的二阶建模下，对于$N\!\le\!16$，性能接近多起点单翻转局部搜索参考的最优值，而四阶模型则显示出低于经典参考的性能上限。该方法为未来容错量子计算机上实现接近最优的大$N$性能提供了一条路径，这些量子计算机能够支持更高深度的QAOA电路。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Burhan Gulbahar et al. |
| 5 | **[Scalable Physics-Inspired Transformers for Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22984v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient sampling of the Boltzmann distribution in frustrated spin glasses is central to statistical mechanics and combinatorial optimization. Despite advances in machine-learning-based approaches, two issues persist: limited understanding of why variational models fail to benefit from increased scale, unlike the monotonic scaling law of large language models; and high computational cost on large systems that negates advantages over classical sampling methods. Here, we develop a physics-inspired transformer with interpretable sparse attention and spin-tailored positional embeddings to address these challenges. By further leveraging FlashAttention for parallel ancestral sampling, it achieves up to two orders of magnitude speedup over vanilla variational autoregressive networks, enabling neural-network simulations of spin-glass systems to unprecedented sizes on a single GPU. It can resolve full probability distributions, free energies, and overlap statistics across temperatures, for Sherrington-Kirkpatrick and 2D or 3D Edwards-Anderson models, where existing machine-learning methods encounter limitations at certain temperatures. This framework thus establishes a scalable paradigm for frustrated spin-glass systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在受挫自旋玻璃中高效采样玻尔兹曼分布是统计力学和组合优化的核心问题。尽管基于机器学习的方法取得了进展，但仍存在两个问题：对变分模型为何未能像大语言模型的单调缩放律那样从规模扩大中受益的理解有限；以及在大系统上的高计算成本抵消了相对于经典采样方法的优势。在此，我们开发了一种具有可解释稀疏注意力和自旋定制位置嵌入的物理启发式Transformer来应对这些挑战。通过进一步利用FlashAttention进行并行祖先采样，它比普通变分自回归网络实现了高达两个数量级的加速，使得自旋玻璃系统的神经网络模拟能够在单个GPU上达到前所未有的规模。它可以解析谢林顿-柯克帕特里克模型以及二维或三维爱德华兹-安德森模型在不同温度下的完整概率分布、自由能和重叠统计量，而现有机器学习方法在特定温度下会遇到限制。因此，该框架为受挫自旋玻璃系统建立了一个可扩展的范式。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Lu Zhong et al. |
| 6 | **[Irreversibility Enhances Quantum-Enhanced Markov-Chain Monte Carlo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23350v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Detailed balance underlies conventional Markov-chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) algorithms. Yet in classical systems, breaking detailed balance generates irreversible probability currents and can accelerate sampling. Whether irreversibility can similarly enhance quantum MCMC remains an intriguing question. Here we show that irreversibility provides a new route to improving the recent quantum-enhanced MCMC (QEMC), which combines quantum proposals with classical acceptance. By introducing state-dependent proposals that break detailed balance while preserving the target stationary distribution, we develop an irreversible quantum-enhanced Monte Carlo (IQEMC). Guided by Landau-Zener transitions, IQEMC promotes large energy descents from high-energy states while maintaining stable transitions near low-energy states. On spin-glass benchmarks, IQEMC outperforms QEMC without increasing computational complexity and, unlike the annealing baseline, exhibits a spectral gap that increases with system size and annealing speed. These results establish irreversibility as a physically grounded mechanism for enhancing quantum MCMC.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>细致平衡是传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）算法的基础。然而在经典系统中，打破细致平衡会产生不可逆的概率流，并可能加速采样。不可逆性能否同样增强量子MCMC仍是一个引人入胜的问题。本文证明，不可逆性为改进近期提出的量子增强MCMC（QEMC）提供了新途径，该算法将量子提议与经典接受相结合。通过引入打破细致平衡同时保持目标平稳分布的状态依赖提议，我们开发了不可逆量子增强蒙特卡洛（IQEMC）算法。在朗道-齐纳跃迁的引导下，IQEMC促进高能态向低能态的大幅下降，同时维持低能态附近的稳定跃迁。在自旋玻璃基准测试中，IQEMC在不增加计算复杂度的情况下优于QEMC，并且与退火基线不同，其谱隙随系统规模和退火速度增大而增大。这些结果确立了不可逆性作为增强量子MCMC的物理驱动机制。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Kefan Cao et al. |
| 7 | **[Universal energy-space localization and stable quantum phases against time-dependent perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.14160v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Stability against perturbations is a highly nontrivial property of quantum systems and is often a requirement to define new phases. In most systems where stability can be rigorously established, only static perturbations are considered; whether any system can remain stable against generic time-dependent perturbations is largely elusive. In this work, we identify a universal phenomenon in driving $q$-local Hamiltonians called energy-space localization and prove that it can survive under generic time-dependent perturbations, where the evolving state is exponentially localized in an energy window of the instantaneous spectrum. For spin glass models where the configuration spaces are separated by large energy barriers, the localization in energy spaces can induce a true localization in configuration spaces and robustly break ergodicity. We then demonstrate its applications in several systems with such barriers. For certain LDPC codes, we show that the system remains localized near the original codeword for an exponentially long time even under generic time-dependent perturbations. For classical optimization problems with clustered solution space, the stability becomes an obstacle for quantum Hamiltonian-based algorithms to escape local minima. Our work provides a new lens for analyzing non-equilibrium dynamics of generic quantum systems, and versatile mathematical tools for establishing stability and for designing quantum algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对扰动的稳定性是量子系统一个高度非平凡的性质，且通常是定义新相的条件。在大多数可以严格建立稳定性的系统中，仅考虑静态扰动；任何系统能否在一般时间依赖扰动下保持稳定仍是一个难以捉摸的问题。本文在驱动$q$-局域哈密顿量中识别出一种称为能量空间局域化的普适现象，并证明它在一般时间依赖扰动下能够存续，其中演化态在瞬时谱的能量窗口内呈指数局域化。对于构型空间被大能量势垒分隔的自旋玻璃模型，能量空间中的局域化可诱导出构型空间中的真正局域化，并稳健地打破遍历性。随后，我们展示了该方法在若干具有此类势垒的系统中的应用。对于某些LDPC码，我们证明即使在一般时间依赖扰动下，系统也能在指数长的时间内局域于原始码字附近。对于解空间具有聚类结构的经典优化问题，该稳定性成为基于量子哈密顿量的算法逃离局部极小值的障碍。本文为分析一般量子系统的非平衡动力学提供了新视角，并为建立稳定性和设计量子算法提供了多功能的数学工具。</p></details> | 2026-06-19 | Hongye Yu et al. |
| 8 | **[Self-averaging of replica overlaps in the random field Edwards-Anderson model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.18752v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The self-averaging of the replica overlap is proven in the Edwards-Anderson (EA) model under random field almost everywhere in the coupling constant space in any dimension. The EA order parameter is represented in terms of the derivative of the free energy density with respect to the random field strength, regardless of boundary conditions. Tasaki's correlation inequality for finite-dimensional spin glass models shows that the expectation of the squared replica overlap is bounded by the squared EA order parameter. These simple evaluations enable us to prove that the variance of the replica overlap vanishes in the infinite-volume limit. The self-averaging of the replica bond overlap is proven also in the EA model with Gaussian exchange interaction without random field. Short-range spin glass models have been shown to behave differently from mean-field spin glass models with RSB phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在任意维度的随机场下，Edwards-Anderson (EA) 模型中复制重叠的自平均性在耦合常数空间几乎处处成立。EA 序参量可表示为自由能密度对随机场强度的导数，且与边界条件无关。Tasaki 关于有限维自旋玻璃模型的关联不等式表明，复制重叠平方的期望值受限于 EA 序参量的平方。这些简单估计使我们得以证明，在无穷体积极限下复制重叠的方差趋于零。在无随机场的高斯交换相互作用 EA 模型中，复制键重叠的自平均性同样得到证明。短程自旋玻璃模型已被证实与具有 RSB 相的平均场自旋玻璃模型行为不同。</p></details> | 2026-06-18 | C. Itoi et al. |
